user.title: Set up Kitafino Meal Plan
user.description: Enter your Kitafino credentials. They are stored only in the Home Assistant config entry.

abort.already_configured: Kitafino Meal Plan is already configured.

init.title: Kitafino Meal Plan options
init.description: Configure local Home Assistant settings. Child rows use one line per child in the format Display Name:slug.

data.shared_source: Use shared Kitafino meal plan source

data_description.children_text: Enter one child per line as Display Name:slug. Child labels are metadata only in shared-source mode.
data_description.update_time: Local time for the daily refresh, using HH:MM.
data_description.mqtt_enabled: Publish meal plan data to MQTT when later MQTT publishing support is active.
data_description.shared_source: Treat the Kitafino meal plan as one shared source instead of child-specific meal data.

error.invalid_child_row: Enter one child per line as Display Name:slug.
error.missing_child_name: Each child row needs a display name before the colon.
error.invalid_child_slug: Child slugs may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores, up to 32 characters.
error.duplicate_child_slug: Each child slug must be unique.
error.invalid_options: One or more options have an invalid value.
error.invalid_update_time: Enter the update time in HH:MM format.
